commit_context: Post-unlock of getupdatedvisits via repurposed ARC022825 API FULL service account

xmlrpc_getupdatedvisits.auth: Bearer token from ARC022825 API FULL service account login
xmlrpc_getupdatedvisits.note: Returns ALL visits with creation or modification timestamp since datechanged

hidden_sample_classification.method: random.sample(hidden_ids, 300) with seed 42, fetched via REST detail endpoint
notable_absences: Zero records with status=4 (classic cancelled code) — this tenant appears NOT to use status 4
Zero records with status=5 (classic no-show) — appears NOT used
Zero records with status=6 (classic reschedule) — appears NOT used
Zero records with cancelnoshowreason populated in the entire sample
This tenant's cancel/no-show codes are 10 and 12 (already captured in REST list pull, 758 records total)

deleted_voided_records.note: Series exceptions, merged duplicates, manual corrections — NEW workflow line not in v2 report

scheduled_moved_between.note: Appointments that were rescheduled (moved date/time) but kept the same visit record

cancel_noshow_total.note: Unchanged from v2 — statuses 10 + 12 in this tenant

kept_clean.note: Still-scheduled, confirmed, arrived, or completed without being moved/voided

impact_on_morning_report.revised_billable_load_estimate: ~900 (50% of additional completed + 50% of deleted workflow time)
impact_on_morning_report.automation_pitch_impact: STRONGER — more measurable workload means a bigger absolute savings, not smaller. The 'bring 1.43 FTEs back to 1' becomes 'bring 1.88 FTEs back to 1'.

recommendation: Morning report v2 headline numbers (1,861 completed, 27.78/day) should be read as lower-bound. Real completed-visit rate is ~42/day. Before recomputing per-workflow LLM costs, run a full-population detail pull of all 3,089 hidden IDs (not just the 300 sample) — ~20 min of throttled calls. Alternatively, live with the sample extrapolation if the error bar on sampling is acceptable (<5% at n=300).
